message:
style(random): rustfmt weibull test assertion onto one line

The RandomState::weibull -0.0 validation assertion in
random_state_legacy_weibull_matches_numpy_oracles was split over four
lines by rustfmt's default wrap after landing in caa4d7f. The
argument width is under the single-line threshold, so collapse it to
match the surrounding test style. No semantic change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
